description: Generate a schematic pathway figure of prokaryotic Moco biosynthesis (GTP -> Mo-MPT + dinucleotide variants) for the review
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyArrowPatch, FancyBboxPatch

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, 8.5))
ax.set_xlim(0, 13); ax.set_ylim(0, 8.5); ax.axis('off')

stage_colors = {'S1':'#cfe8ff','S2':'#d6f5d6','S3':'#ffe6cc','S4':'#f0d9ff'}

def metab(x, y, label, w=1.7, h=0.7, fc='#ffffff'):
    box = FancyBboxPatch((x-w/2, y-h/2), w, h, boxstyle="round,pad=0.03,rounding_size=0.08",
                         fc=fc, ec='#333333', lw=1.4)
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(x, y, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

def enzyme(x, y, label, color='#444'):
    ax.text(x, y, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8.5, color=color, style='italic')

def arrow(x1, y1, x2, y2):
    ax.add_patch(FancyArrowPatch((x1, y1), (x2, y2), arrowstyle='-|>', mutation_scale=16,
                                 lw=1.8, color='#222'))

# Stage bands (background)
for (x0, lbl, key) in [(0.2,'Stage 1: cPMP formation','S1'),
                       (0.2,'',''),]:
    pass

# Metabolites row (main linear pathway)
y0 = 6.6
metab(1.2, y0, 'GTP', fc='#eeeeee')
metab(4.0, y0, 'cPMP', fc=stage_colors['S1'])
metab(6.8, y0, 'MPT', fc=stage_colors['S2'])
metab(9.6, y0, 'Mo-MPT', fc=stage_colors['S3'])

arrow(2.05, y0, 3.15, y0)
arrow(4.85, y0, 5.95, y0)
arrow(7.65, y0, 8.75, y0)

# Enzyme labels above arrows
enzyme(2.6, y0+0.55, 'MoaA  +  MoaC', '#1a4f8a')
ax.text(2.6, y0+0.9, '(radical-SAM 3′,8-cyclase; cPMP synthase)', ha='center', fontsize=6.8, color='#1a4f8a')
enzyme(5.4, y0+0.55, 'MoeB → MoaD; MoaD₂-MoaE₂', '#1d6b1d')
ax.text(5.4, y0+0.9, '(ubiquitin-like sulfur relay; 2×S)', ha='center', fontsize=6.8, color='#1d6b1d')
enzyme(8.2, y0+0.55, 'MogA / MoaB → MoeA', '#a85400')
ax.text(8.2, y0+0.9, '(adenylylation → molybdate insertion)', ha='center', fontsize=6.8, color='#a85400')

# intermediates below main arrows
ax.text(2.6, y0-0.55, '3′,8-cH₂GTP', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='#555')
ax.text(8.2, y0-0.55, 'MPT-AMP', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='#555')

# Stage 4: branch from Mo-MPT
metab(11.6, 7.4, 'MGD / bis-MGD', w=2.0, fc=stage_colors['S4'])
metab(11.6, 5.8, 'MCD', w=2.0, fc=stage_colors['S4'])
arrow(10.45, y0+0.15, 10.9, 7.15)
arrow(10.45, y0-0.15, 10.9, 6.05)
enzyme(11.2, 8.0, 'MobA (GTP)', '#7a1fa2')
enzyme(11.2, 5.2, 'MocA (CTP)', '#7a1fa2')
ax.text(11.6, 4.75, 'DMSO-reductase family\n(NarGHI, FDH...) needs bis-MGD',
        ha='center', fontsize=6.3, color='#555')

# "STOP here" note for Mo-MPT
ax.text(9.6, 5.75, 'sulfite-oxidase\nfamily uses Mo-MPT', ha='center', fontsize=6.3, color='#555')

# Stage boundary bands (bottom): inputs & boundaries
by = 3.2
ax.text(6.5, 4.15, 'MODULE BOUNDARIES (excluded but coupled)', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#900')
bnd = [
 ('Molybdate uptake\nModABC / ModE', 1.8),
 ('Sulfur supply\nIscS → TusA → MoeB/MoaD', 4.9),
 ('Terminal Mo=S\nsulfuration', 7.7),
 ('Apo-enzyme\ncofactor insertion (XdhC-type)', 10.6),
]
for txt, x in bnd:
    box = FancyBboxPatch((x-1.35, by-0.55), 2.7, 1.1, boxstyle="round,pad=0.03,rounding_size=0.08",
                         fc='#fdeaea', ec='#c04040', lw=1.1, ls='--')
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(x, by, txt, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7.2)

# dashed feed arrows from boundaries to pathway
ax.add_patch(FancyArrowPatch((4.9, by+0.6),(5.4,6.05), arrowstyle='-|>', mutation_scale=10, lw=1.0, color='#c04040', ls='--'))
ax.add_patch(FancyArrowPatch((1.8, by+0.6),(8.2,6.05), arrowstyle='-|>', mutation_scale=10, lw=1.0, color='#c04040', ls=(0,(2,4)), alpha=0.5))

# Legend for stages
handles = [mpatches.Patch(color=stage_colors['S1'], label='Stage 1: pterin construction'),
           mpatches.Patch(color=stage_colors['S2'], label='Stage 2: dithiolene (2×S) install'),
           mpatches.Patch(color=stage_colors['S3'], label='Stage 3: adenylylation + Mo insertion'),
           mpatches.Patch(color=stage_colors['S4'], label='Stage 4: optional dinucleotide (conditional)')]
ax.legend(handles=handles, loc='lower center', bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02), ncol=2, fontsize=8, frameon=False)

ax.set_title('Prokaryotic molybdenum cofactor biosynthesis: GTP → Mo-MPT and optional dinucleotide variants',
             fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('moco_pathway_schematic.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
print('Figure saved: moco_pathway_schematic.png')
